title: Reproducible analysis for video-coded bimanual coordination during laparoscopic suturing training
description: Python code, deidentified processed data, derived tables, source-data files, four generated figures, and documented stability checks for the statistical analyses reported in a study of video-coded bimanual coordination during laparoscopic suturing training and subsequent simulation transfer performance.
notes: Raw videos, source workbooks, participant demographics, and reliability source records are excluded because they are outside the reported statistical-analysis package or may be subject to consent, ethics, and institutional restrictions. Processed data files are separately licensed under CC BY 4.0 in DATA_LICENSE.md.
